topPerformers.reason: Hot audience (ATC + init checkout) - highest intent

underperformers.issue: Highest spend, lowest ROAS - creative fatigue or audience mismatch
underperformers.recommendation: Test 3 new creative angles (bilateral balance, imbalance reveal, coach endorsement)

issues.issue: Campaign B spending 58% of budget with 0.31x ROAS
issues.action: Pause current creatives, test new angles immediately

issues.issue: Overall ROAS 0.37x vs 1.2x target (31% of goal)
issues.impact: Losing money on every dollar spent at current rate
issues.action: Execute budget rebalancing: move from B → C,D

madgicxRecommendations.title: Stop-loss for acquisition ads with no clicks
madgicxRecommendations.action: Pause any ad in Campaign B with 0 clicks in 24hrs to save budget

madgicxRecommendations.title: Retest promising old ads
madgicxRecommendations.action: Campaign D creatives are winning - duplicate and scale 20% more budget

madgicxRecommendations.title: Retarget recent visitors (past 30 days)
madgicxRecommendations.action: Expand Campaign C budget +$20/day - warm audience is 2x more profitable

recommendations.title: 🚨 URGENT: Rebalance Budget
recommendations.description: Move $50/day from Campaign B → Campaigns C & D (proven winners). Expected impact: +150% ROAS improvement
recommendations.action: Reduce B from $100 → $50/day. Increase C from $50 → $70/day. Increase D from $30 → $50/day

recommendations.title: 🎨 Creative Testing Sprint
recommendations.description: Campaign B has ad fatigue. Test 3 new creative angles from competitor research (bilateral balance, imbalance reveal, coach testimonial)
recommendations.action: Launch 3 new ads with $15/day each (testing spend). Pause 3 worst performers
recommendations.timeline: Launch by EOW, evaluate by April 7

recommendations.title: 📈 Audience Expansion
recommendations.description: Current targeting too narrow. Test 5% and 10% lookalike audiences alongside 1% LLA in Campaign D (best performer)
recommendations.action: Create 2 new audience stacks for Campaign D. Allocate $10/day test budget each
